default.name: default
default.description: General purpose reasoning with balanced creativity and precision

precise.name: precise
precise.description: High precision deterministic outputs for code generation and structured tasks

creative.name: creative
creative.description: Creative exploration and ideation with high temperature sampling

deep-reasoning.name: deep-reasoning
deep-reasoning.description: Extended reasoning with chain-of-thought and step-by-step analysis
deep-reasoning.system_suffix:
Think step-by-step. Show your reasoning process before arriving at the final answer. Use the format:
1. Understanding: [What is being asked]
2. Analysis: [Key considerations and constraints]
3. Reasoning: [Step-by-step thought process]
4. Final Answer: [Concise conclusion]

fast-response.name: fast-response
fast-response.description: Quick responses with lower token limits for rapid iteration

code-generation.name: code-generation
code-generation.description: Optimized for code generation with deterministic sampling
code-generation.system_suffix: Generate idiomatic, well-commented code following best practices. Include error handling and type hints where applicable.

problem-solving.name: problem-solving
problem-solving.description: Systematic problem decomposition and solution synthesis
problem-solving.system_suffix: Break down complex problems into manageable components. Consider edge cases and potential failure modes. Provide concrete actionable steps.

code-review.name: code-review
code-review.description: Critical analysis for code review with focus on quality and maintainability
code-review.system_suffix: Evaluate code for correctness, readability, maintainability, performance, and security. Provide specific actionable feedback with examples.
